task_completion.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire application window is visible on the screen.
A blank white flipchart canvas is visible within the ActivInspire application.

task_completion.description: Add the required text annotation to the flipchart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Welcome to Today's Lesson' is typed onto the flipchart canvas.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct directory in the Save dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is open, and the current directory path is shown as '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct filename in the Save dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'lesson_with_text' or 'lesson_with_text.flipchart' is entered into the File Name field of the Save dialog.
The Save dialog closes and the ActivInspire window title or tab updates to 'lesson_with_text', or a file explorer/terminal shows the file exists at the target path.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to create the flipchart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the ActivInspire interface and typing on the canvas, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used ActivInspire, not a substitute application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is distinctly Promethean ActivInspire, not a generic text editor, LibreOffice, or other presentation software.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the task
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal commands visible that attempt to mock or touch the file (e.g., 'touch /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/lesson_with_text.flipchart').

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using ActivInspire (Promethean interactive whiteboard software). The expected text on the canvas is exactly 'Welcome to Today's Lesson'. The file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' with the filename 'lesson_with_text.flipchart'. Because .flipchart files are complex ZIP archives containing XML, they must be created via the ActivInspire GUI; simple terminal text commands will not produce a valid file.
